{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Purelake Remnant
| introduced = Soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[binding]] Gesha worked on was from a [[Purelake Remnant]] with a primary aspect of water.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c11">''Soulsmith'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
